    net/miniupnpd: use libpfctl

    Start using libpfctl to replace the removed ioctl calls (DIOCGETSTATUS,
    DIOCGETRULE).

    PR:             274819
    Approved by:    maintainer timeout
    Sponsored by:   Rubicon Communications, LLC ("Netgate")
